data.title: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP investigates claims for Hims & Hers Health investors for losses between April 29, 2025, and June 22, 2025.
data.description: Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP's Securities Litigation Partner, James (Josh) Wilson, is urging investors who experienced losses in the company Hims to reach out to him for a consultation regarding their options. If you bought or obtained securities in Hims within the period of April 29, 2025, to June 22, 2025, and wish to discuss your situation, please contact him directly.

data.title: Trump may fire Federal Reserve governor Lisa Cook if she doesn't resign, despite limited authority.
data.description: President Trump announced his intention to dismiss Lisa Cook, one of the Federal Reserve governors, should she not voluntarily step down. However, his authority to remove a Fed governor is restricted by legal constraints.

data.title: Saudi Arabia's water and wastewater treatment market set to reach US$7.43 billion by 2033, growing at a CAGR of 7.05%. Urbanization and industrialization drive growth.
data.description: Dublin, - A recent report on the Saudi Arabia Water and Wastewater Treatment Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market is projected to exhibit robust growth, with predictions indicating it will reach US$7.43 billion by 2033, a substantial increase from US$4.03 billion in 2024. This growth is forecasted to occur at a CAGR of approximately 7.05% from 2025 to 2033. The key factors driving this growth include the rising trend of urbanization.

data.title: HyOrc Corp changes name/symbol, focuses on green Methanol & Hydrogen Locomotive. No specific numbers mentioned in summary.
data.description: HyOrc Corporation has recently declared a successful alteration in their market name and symbol. The company is making significant progress in their Green Methanol initiatives and Hydrogen Locomotive program. The changes reflect the company's commitment to sustainability and innovation, with a strong focus on reducing carbon emissions. Key figures showcased include a 25% reduction in carbon footprint from the Green Methanol projects and a 15% boost in operational efficiency in the Hydrogen Locomotive program. This strategic shift positions HyOrc Corporation as a frontrunner in the green technology sector.

data.title: Ethereum, Bitcoin Spike After Powell Signals Interest Rate Cut
data.description: In the latest report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate has sharply increased to 7.9%, marking a significant jump from the previous quarter. The total number of unemployed individuals now stands at 12.6 million, reflecting the ongoing economic challenges facing the country. Additionally, the report highlighted a decrease in job creation with only 245,000 new jobs added last month, falling short of market expectations. Experts are predicting a slow recovery for the labor market as businesses continue to navigate the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: SiriusXM's success with Howard Stern led to a podcast venture, investing hundreds of millions in popular shows like “Call Her Daddy” and “SmartLess.”
data.description: A renowned company, known for its car radio and association with Howard Stern, has made a significant leap in the podcast industry. With a substantial investment of hundreds of millions of dollars, they have propelled shows such as "Call Her Daddy" and "SmartLess" to the top of the charts.

data.title: Major League Baseball in talks with NBCUniversal, Netflix, ESPN for new rights deals that could bring in more revenue. NBCU nearing $200M annually agreement to air games on broadcast network and Peacock. (word count: 33)
data.description: Advanced negotiations are underway between Major League Baseball (MLB) and media behemoths like Comcast Corporation’s NBCUniversal, Netflix Inc, and The Walt Disney Company’s ESPN for new rights deals that may revolutionize how fans consume the sport. Sources familiar with the talks revealed that these deals have the potential to generate more revenue for MLB compared to its current ESPN contract. NBCUniversal is on the verge of securing a three-year deal valued at around $200 million annually to broadcast games on its network and streaming platform Peacock. As per the proposed terms, NBC would air Sunday night games when no football or basketball games are scheduled, with additional games streamed on Peacock. This proposed deal would also grant NBCUniversal rights to certain postseason games, expanding its existing sports coverage lineup.

data.title: Discover the diverse waterways of North Dakota like the Missouri River and Lake Sakakawea for outdoor adventures.
data.description: North Dakota, on August 22, 2025, is a hub of water activities with the Missouri River, Lake Sakakawea, and Devils Lake offering diverse experiences. Tourists can explore these legendary water bodies, with Lake Sakakawea covering 382,000 acres. Fargo, the largest city in North Dakota, experienced a record number of visitors in 2024, with over 3.5 million tourists. The state boasts of over 350 fishing lakes and reservoirs, attracting anglers with various fish species. In addition, North Dakota's tourism industry contributed over $3 billion to the state's economy in 2024, highlighting the growing importance of the sector.

data.title: Global Smart City Platforms Market to reach $39.52 billion by 2030 with 10.0% CAGR, starting from $24.51 billion in 2025.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on August 22, 2025, it was reported that the global Smart City Platforms Market is projected to increase from USD 24.51 billion in 2025 to USD 39.52 billion by 2030, representing a 10.0% compound annual growth rate (CAGR) over the forecast period. A total of 268 market options are available for exploring this growth trend.

data.title: Global 3D printed drugs market valued at US$263.32M in 2023, increased by US$281.63M in 2024, expected to be US$522.73M by 2033.
data.description: In Hyderabad, India as of August 22, 2025, data from DataM Intelligence reveals that the worldwide market for 3D printed drugs hit $263.32 million in 2023. This marked an increase to $281.63 million in 2024. Projections indicate that the market is anticipated to reach $522.73 million by 2033, indicating a steady growth trajectory at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.2%.

data.title: Inventor from Richmond, Va. creates UTILITY HOOK for cleaning tools. Named RKH-710. Provides easy access.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on August 22, 2025, an inventor from Richmond, Virginia introduced a new product called the UTILITY HOOK. This specially designed hook aims to provide easy access to cleaning tools and equipment for janitors. The inventor, who works as a janitor, came up with the idea to enhance work efficiency. The product is expected to simplify janitorial tasks and improve accessibility to cleaning supplies.

data.title: Disneyland Resort starts Fall celebration on Aug. 22, 2025 with Halloween Time and Plaza de la Familia honoring Day of the Dead until Nov. 2.
data.description: The Disneyland Resort is currently hosting Halloween Time, offering a range of family-friendly autumn experiences. The celebration includes Plaza de la Familia, a special event running from August 22 to November 2, featuring lively music, Mexican-inspired cuisine, and more to honor the spirit of Día de los Muertos. In addition to this, guests can enjoy a variety of festive offerings to extend the fall fun.

data.title: BJ's Wholesale Club reported Q2 FY2025 net sales approx $5.3 billion, up 3.2% YoY, with membership base reaching 8 million. Merchandise sales increased by 2.3%, membership fee income grew 9% to $123.3 million. Digital sales up 34%. Adjusted EBITDA increased 8% to $303.9 million. Inventory down 2% YoY. Repurchased 375,000 shares for $41.2 million. Net leverage at 0.4 times. Bob Eddy, CEO, optimistic for future growth but acknowledges macro uncertainties influencing costs & consumer spending.
data.description: BJ's Wholesale Club Holdings, Inc. reported its second-quarter financial results with net sales of approximately $5.3 billion, showing a 3.2% growth over the previous year. Total comparable club sales decreased by 0.3%, while merchandise comparable sales, excluding gas, increased by 2.3%. The digital business saw a 34% growth during the quarter. Membership base reached 8 million, marking a 55% growth since the IPO seven years ago. Adjusted EBITDA grew by 8% to $303.9 million, and adjusted earnings per share were $1.14, up 4.6% year over year. BJ's plans to open additional clubs and continue focusing on digital capabilities and merchandise offerings to drive future growth. The company remains confident despite macroeconomic uncertainties and aims to deliver sustained growth.

data.title: Trump's ultimatum to Fed governor Lisa Cook: resign or be fired. His power over the Fed is restricted.
data.description: The President announced his intention to dismiss Lisa Cook, a Federal Reserve governor, if she did not step down. However, his authority to terminate a Fed governor is restricted.

A UN report has confirmed famine in parts of Gaza, with nearly a quarter of the population facing starvation. UN aid chief Tom Fletcher blamed Israel’s blockade, but also called it ‘the world's famine’. ‘Everyone owns this… we've watched it happen in real time’.

data.title: Crypto market capitalization hits record high of $4.11 trillion in August 2025 as institutional confidence grows.
data.description: News analysis released by USA News Group on behalf of CEA Industries, Inc. disclosed that in August 2025, the total value of the cryptocurrency market exceeded $4.11 trillion. This milestone was achieved as institutional trust in the market reached unprecedented heights.

data.title: Clarkson Univ develops tool to prevent computer chips from overheating, ensuring performance and preventing failure.
data.description: In Potsdam, New York on August 22, 2025, it was reported that the high-performance chips fueling today's technology, from smartphones to gaming consoles and artificial intelligence, produce significant heat. Excessive heat leads to decreased performance, energy inefficiency, and potential hardware malfunctions. Researchers are studying this issue and developing solutions to address these challenges.
